news.headline: Trump claims Iran wants ceasefire, Tehran calls remarks ‘false and baseless’
news.summary:
US President Donald Trump on Wednesday claimed that Iran’s leader wanted a ceasefire, in a social media post that Tehran called “false and baseless”.

news.headline: Lamine Yamal condemns racist abuse aimed at Egypt
news.summary: Lamine Yamal says racist chants heard during Spain's 0-0 draw with Egypt in Barcelona on Tuesday were "disrespectful and intolerable".
